rationale: The citing note explicitly states this is a “one-page tribute essay and response to Johnson (2005),” indicating the cited paper is a direct target rather than a generic background mention. The cited DOI (10.1509/jmkr.2005.42.3.243) matches the companion 2005 JMR memoir “A Career between Theory and Practice,” which aligns closely with the tribute’s core discussion of Johnson’s contributions. This looks substantively connected enough to warrant full relation judgment.
